expectations.text: Reports a total endpoint count in the ballpark of 180-200
expectations.evidence: Reports 256 total endpoints across 187 unique paths. 187 paths is in range; 256 is operations count.

expectations.text: Provides a breakdown by HTTP method
Identifies at least 8 distinct resource groups
expectations.evidence: Lists 18 resource groups with operation counts: cards, boards, members, organizations, enterprises, actions, notifications, lists, checklists, tokens, plugins, customFields, webhooks, labels, search, emoji, batch, applications

expectations.text: Correctly identifies authentication as API key + token query parameters
expectations.evidence: Dedicated Authentication section: 'query-parameter-based API key + token authentication' with table showing APIKey and APIToken as apiKey type in query

expectations.text: Identifies at least 3 complex schemas with property details
expectations.evidence: Table of 10 most complex schemas with property counts: Member (42), Card (33), Board (26), Prefs (22), Enterprise (18), etc.

expectations.text: Overview is well-organized with clear sections
expectations.evidence: 6 sections: Endpoint Summary, Resource Groups, Authentication, Schema Inventory, Most Parameter-Heavy Endpoints, Key Observations
